name: lake
title: Lake day
description: The full demo — time windows, precedence, an optional kiteboard, and a conditional duration.

name: lake_infeasible
title: Lake day (over-constrained)
description: A deliberately INFEASIBLE plan to show the 'why infeasible' explainer: leaving after 9 PM plus 'drive before sailing' pushes sailing past midnight. Load it, then click 'Which rules conflict?' on the red banner.

name: nasa_mission_3day
title: 3-Day NASA Mission (4 crew)
description: 4-crew Artemis-style 3-day arc that spreads across the horizon: Day-1 Orion transit + burn, Day-2 HLS docking/transfer, Day-3 EVA. Daily rhythm (meals, comms passes, exercise) uses recurs_daily so each lands once per day with no precedence wiring; one-off mission phases stay pinned by working_window day filters; sleeps are nightly working_window blocks. Exercises all 6 constraint types incl. 4 per-crew no_overlap groups; horizon 4320 (3 days).
